title: Soulection White Label: 015
content:
We are back with our 15th installation of the White Label series from DMV-based producer, Louie Lastic. You may not have heard much about Louie Lastic, but that's all about to change.

Pulling influences from tribal house to trap, soul and lounge-y uptempo rhythms, Louie's latest collection of jams for this White Label inspire.

"The whole team over at Soulection has been showing me so much love since day one, it's only right that we put out a White Label together. 
These three songs are a true representation of who I am and what my music is about: positivity, soul and energy - hope you all enjoy listening to these tracks as much I enjoyed making them." - Louie Lastic
